task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Calendar module in OpenEMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR interface shows the Calendar view, typically a grid of times and dates.

task_completion.description: The correct provider 'Administrator, Administrator' is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar header or the 'Add Event' modal explicitly displays 'Administrator, Administrator' as the selected provider.

task_completion.description: Event is scheduled for 3 business days from the current date, from 2:00 PM to 3:30 PM
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the event creation modal or calendar view, the date is set to 3 business days ahead (skipping weekends) relative to the system clock shown in screenshots. The time is set to 14:00 (start) and 15:30 (end) or 2:00 PM - 3:30 PM.

task_completion.description: Event description is set to 'Compliance Training' and no patient is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' or 'Description' field contains 'Compliance Training'. The 'Patient' field is empty, set to 'None', or clearly indicates this is a non-patient appointment (e.g., 'In Office' or 'Administrative').

task_completion.description: The event is successfully saved and appears on the calendar grid
task_completion.visual_evidence: A block labeled 'Compliance Training' is visible on the calendar grid at the correct date and time slot (14:00-15:30).

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the OpenEMR web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR web interface within a browser window, with visible UI elements like buttons, forms, and navigation menus.

integrity.description: Agent manually enters data rather than pasting via backend/console
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show the 'Add Event' modal open with fields being populated or dropdowns being selected.

integrity.description: Agent does not use browser developer tools or terminal to inject data
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or external terminal windows are visible overlaying the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Provider Name: 'Administrator, Administrator'. Target Time: 14:00 to 15:30 (2:00 PM to 3:30 PM). Duration: 90 minutes.
